text:
料理ってもちろん味が大切だけど
見た目も同じくらい重要なの。

細工包丁があれば
もっと華やかな見た目が
演出できると思うのよね。

でも私の料理って変わった食材が多いし
普通の細工包丁じゃまたすぐに
壊れちゃうと思うわ。

だから、今回もあなたに
素材探しをお願いしたい

When you're cooking, flavor is obviously a top
priority, but presentation is also key.

I think I need a finer, more precise knife
to really unleash the full, beautiful potential
of my creations.

But as you know, I use some... unorthodox
ingredients. I don't think a regular knife could
survive in my kitchen for very long.

Which is why I'd like to send you out in search
of more utensil parts! Good luck!
